title: Masik's Puzzle Dungeon
description: New jungle dungeon with lots of puzzles
body:
![Title](https://imgur.com/BqSquR8.png)
This dungeon is a randomly generated structure that generates in a Jungle biome.
There is a wiki, where you can find hints and solutions to all rooms.

![Map to The Dungeon](https://imgur.com/4GPhjUd.png)
You can find a map leading to this dungeon in buried treasure chests(you will need it because the dungeon is very rare).

Here are some screenshots:
![Outside](https://imgur.com/V3xBhI2.png)

![Entrance](https://imgur.com/RPFZezi.png)

![Puzzle example](https://imgur.com/y4Br2Ie.png)

![Puzzle example](https://imgur.com/u03Kkmb.png)

![Overgrown part entrance](https://imgur.com/arbcjDO.png)

![Puzzle example in overgrown part](https://imgur.com/oqBTszv.png)

![Other Projects](https://imgur.com/qJIVtFH.png)

[![Mythic Charms](https://imgur.com/V0gVr5C.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythic-charms)

[![More Armor Trims](https://imgur.com/uG4WJHv.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-armor-trims)
